title: `H5FD_fileobj_open` has unchecked malloc + immediate deref
author: devdanzin
body:
`stdlib_malloc(sizeof(H5FD_fileobj_t))` result used on the next line without NULL check. Segfault on OOM during file-object open.
- `h5fd.pyx:132-135`

comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body:
The first part (checking malloc's return value) is addressed in #2843 
the other part I don't get yet:
- I don't see what "immediate deref" refers to
- I don't know what you mean by "OOM"

Could you clarify these ?

comments.author: devdanzin
comments.body: https://github.com/h5py/h5py/pull/2843 fixes the full issue. Immediate deref just means that in the line right after malloc we have a write to a pointer member (`f.fileobj = fileobj`). OOM is an Out of Memory condition, the situation where malloc would return NULL. So the issue is just that malloc may return NULL when there's no memory left and the PR fixes it.

comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body: thanks ! in that case we case just close it now !
